questions.prompt: Is the asset management system configuration reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?

capability_questions.capability_name: Threat protection and supply chain visibility

questions.prompt: Does the asset management system have the capability of enabling endpoint-specific threat protections?

questions.intent: Evaluate are the endpoint-specific threat protections applicable enterprise-wide?

questions.prompt: Are the users allowed to access specific assets reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the users allowed to access specific assets reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.evaluation_focus: Separate asset management custodians by asset type

questions.prompt: Is shadow IT discovery automated in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate is shadow IT discovery automated in the enterprise?

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging asset-based lifecycle logs and activity to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formal documented process for logging asset-based lifecycle logs and activity to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Is logging of asset management logs made securely to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to asset state and asset activity captured and transferred to the SOC?
